problem id: 294557bb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  01111100 -> 00011111
  01000000 -> 00010000
  01101001 -> 01011010
  00100011 -> 11001000
  01101010 -> 10011010
  01101110 -> 10011011
  01110111 -> 11011101
  10101000 -> 00101010
  01001011 -> 11010010

query: 00000001
predicted answer: 01000000
